title: Cowperï؟½s Reply.
content:
آ آ آ آ To be rememberï؟½d thus is fame,
آ آ آ آ And in the first degree;
آ آ آ آ And did the few, like her, the same,
آ آ آ آ The press might rest for me.


آ آ آ آ So Homer, in the memï؟½ry stored
آ آ آ آ Of many a Grecian belle,
آ آ آ آ Was once preservedï؟½a richer hoard,
آ آ آ آ But never lodged so well.
meaning:
"Cowperï؟½s Reply." is a quintessential example of William Cowper's signature style...

### Why We Love This Line
At Linespedia, we believe that poetry is the ultimate sanctuary for the soul...
